## Project Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - HTML frontend web app

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Created index.html with semantic structure
  - Created styles.css with responsive design
  - Created script.js with core functionality
  - Created assets/ directory
  - Created README.md documentation
  - Created .gitignore file

- [x] Customize the Project
  - Project structure follows best practices
  - Includes example navigation and sections
  - Ready for customization

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  - No external extensions required for this HTML frontend app
  - Optional: Install "Live Server" extension for development (by Ritwick Dey)

- [x] Compile the Project
  - HTML/CSS/JS project - no compilation required
  - All files are valid and ready to serve

- [x] Create and Run Task
  - Created tasks.json with Live Server integration
  - Added shortcut to open app in browser

- [x] Launch the Project
  - Ready for development
  - Use Live Server extension or open index.html directly in browser

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - README.md created and up to date
  - copilot-instructions.md finalized

## Project Information

**Project Type:** HTML/CSS/JavaScript Frontend Web App
**Description:** Alana's Recipe Finder - A web app that searches for recipes based on user-entered ingredients using the TheMealDB API

## Implementation Details

- **Recipe API**: TheMealDB (free, no authentication required)
- **Search Method**: Ingredient-based queries via API
- **Features**: 
  - User enters comma-separated ingredients
  - App searches for recipes containing those ingredients
  - Results displayed in a responsive grid layout
  - Each recipe links to full preparation details
